column1: The dog is roaming around restlessly
column2: O cachorro esta andando de um lado para o outro inquieto

column1: A guardsman dressed in the livery of the noble house Berryn scowls at you
column2: Um guarda vestido com a libre da nobre casa Berryn olha feio para voce

column1: Armsmaster Lyra awaits you at the main entrance
column2: A mestra de armas Lyra espera por voce na entrada principal

column1: You best talk to her if you've not already done so
column2: E melhor voce falar com ela se ainda nao o fez
o ajudante de cozinha de rosto avermelhado faz uma leve reverencia

column1: The scarred and graying veteran smiles varmly towards you

column1: There's a steely resolve in her eyes, but she gives you a warm, if sad smile by way of greeting
column2: Hay una ferrea determinacion en sus ojos, pero voce dedica una calida, aunque triste, sonrisa a modo de saludo

column1: Chamberlain to the governor of Idra
{addVocalBarkLocal|I've too much on my mind right now...}
column2: {addVocalBarkLocalTengo demasiadas cosas en la cabeza ahora mismo...}

column2: Un hombre harapiento, cubierto de tierra

column1: On your way through the refugee camp you notice a woman and a pale-looking child huddled together beneath an old, worn blanket
column2: En tu camino por el campo de refugiados, ves a una mujer y a un nino de aspecto palido acurrucados bajo una manta vieja y gastada

column1: She's ragged and far to lean but she is smiling from ear to ear as she clutches her stuffed animal

column1: She's ragged and far to lean and looks like she's been crying recently
column2: Ela esta andrajosa, magra demais e parece ter chorado recentemente

column2: O homem chamado de Snow por sua tripulacao ja foi o primeiro oficial do Zefiro

column2: Um dos infelizes sobreviventes do Zefiro

column1: The woman looks torn, tattered and exhausted
column2: A mulher parece abalada, andrajosa e exausta

column1: As you approach, she offers a tired, but grateful smile
